creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Apr 12, 2007 at 19:00:20 +0000, Vivek Khera wrote:
>  
>  Thanks for catching that.  Here's a patch to the plist.
>  
>  --- #pkg-plist~ Thu Apr 12 14:50:28 2007
>  +++ pkg-plist   Thu Apr 12 14:50:28 2007
>  @@ -10,7 +10,9 @@
>  share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.sql
>  share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.v74.sql
>  share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.v80.sql
>  +share/postgresql/xxid.v74.sql
>  share/postgresql/xxid.v80.sql
>  +share/postgresql/xxid.v81.sql
>  %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/show_configuration
>  %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/slon_kill
>  %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/slon_start
>  

Hello,

This patch still lets somethings left, would you mind if I apply this
patch?

--- /usr/ports/databases/slony1/pkg-plist	Tue Jan  9 01:29:01 2007
+++ /home/tinderbox/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports/databases/slony1/pkg-plist	Fri Apr 13 16:15:05 2007
@@ -7,10 +7,14 @@
 share/postgresql/slony1_base.sql
 share/postgresql/slony1_base.v74.sql
 share/postgresql/slony1_base.v80.sql
+share/postgresql/slony1_base.v81.sql
 share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.sql
 share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.v74.sql
 share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.v80.sql
+share/postgresql/slony1_funcs.v81.sql
+share/postgresql/xxid.v74.sql
 share/postgresql/xxid.v80.sql
+share/postgresql/xxid.v81.sql
 %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/show_configuration
 %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/slon_kill
 %%PERLTOOLS%%sbin/slon_start
@@ -174,7 +178,7 @@
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/function.upgradeschema-text.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/hdrcmds.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/help.html
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/i11220.html
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/i11381.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/index.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/installation.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/adminguide/listenpaths.html

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
